note: axe-core npm package not installed (no-new-deps rule). Violations identified via manual static analysis of all renderer TSX files. Fixes applied in the same pass.

passes: h1 present with sr-only class and aria-label
wordmark img has alt text, aria-hidden on decorative copy
CTA button has type=button and aria-label
No form elements — no label linkage needed
label[for=agent-name-input] linked to input[id=agent-name-input]
aria-describedby on input points to error paragraph when present
aria-invalid toggled on error
error p has role=alert
hint p has aria-live=polite
Back/Continue buttons have aria-label and type attributes
All three inputs have id matching label[for]
aria-required=true on all inputs
Google button has aria-label
Error paragraph has role=alert and aria-live=polite
trust-signal p has aria-label, lock SVG aria-hidden

serious.description: Interactive role=checkbox nested inside interactive role=listitem; the outer row also handled click/keydown — two interactive controls for one action violates the nested-interactive rule
serious.fix_applied: Replaced div.google-service-row with <label role=listitem> containing a visually-hidden <input type=checkbox> and a purely decorative visual indicator (aria-hidden). Removed role=checkbox and duplicate keyboard handlers from the row element.

serious.description: Elements with role=tab must be owned by an element with role=tablist. The tablist was on div.tab-strip but tabs were direct children of the intermediate div.tab-strip__tabs (no role), breaking required tablist→tab ownership.
serious.fix_applied: Moved role=tablist and added aria-label='Browser tabs' to div.tab-strip__tabs (direct parent of tab items). Changed outer div.tab-strip to role=presentation to remove phantom tablist semantics.

serious.description: Close button inside tab item had no type attribute — defaults to type=submit which can trigger unexpected form submission if ever wrapped in a form.
serious.fix_applied: Added type=button to tab close button.

serious.description: New-tab button had no type attribute.

passes: pill-input has aria-label='Agent prompt input'
Search icon span has aria-hidden=true
pill-empty-state div has aria-hidden=true
pill-divider has aria-hidden=true
PillInput is auto-focused on mount

moderate.description: Modal close button in base Modal component had no type attribute — potential accidental form submission.
moderate.fix_applied: Added type=button to Modal close button in src/renderer/components/base/Modal.tsx.

passes: label[for=api-key-input] linked to input
Eye toggle button has aria-label='Show/Hide API key'
Status paragraph has role=status and aria-live=polite
Settings sidebar uses role=navigation with aria-label
Nav items use aria-current=page on active tab
Arrow-key roving tabindex implemented (tabIndex -1 on inactive items)
Settings shell has role=application with aria-label
Main content area uses <main> landmark
Header uses <header> landmark
Agent tab input has label[for=agent-name-input]
Appearance tab uses <fieldset><legend> for radio group
Factory Reset modal uses Modal base component (role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-labelledby)
